description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a large, rectangular, solid metal head with slightly beveled edges and a flat striking face. The head is dark gray, suggesting it is made of steel or iron, and is securely mounted on a straight, cylindrical handle. The handle is dark brown and appears to be made of wood or a composite material, with a textured, ribbed grip section at the lower end for enhanced handling and slip resistance. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding, emphasizing function over form. The hammer is well-suited for heavy-duty tasks such as breaking concrete, driving stakes, or demolition work in urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a solid, dark metal head and a straight, ribbed brown handle for a secure grip. Designed for powerful impact tasks in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full rectangular metal head and the length of the ribbed handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat striking face of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same rectangular head and ribbed handle visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back face of the hammer head and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a ribbed, rubberized grip section for enhanced hold and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of solid metal with flat striking faces and slightly beveled edges.
